title: Cross-Task CSD Leading Indicator Evaluation with Bootstrap CIs, Alternative Variance Models, and Negative Controls
summary: Demo notebook evaluating CSD (Critical Slowing Down) indicators as leading indicators of LLM reasoning collapse across multiple task families. Implements 6 analysis blocks: leading indicator detection with bootstrap CIs, alternative variance model comparison (AIC/BIC), cross-task consistency via Fisher's method, Cohen's d effect sizes, negative controls, and 3-criterion hypothesis verdict. Uses 64 curated examples from 4 datasets (2 positive pairs: arithmetic/llama and graph_coloring/gpt-4o-mini; 2 negative controls: syllogistic/ministral-3b and multi_hop/llama).
